title: Our Hearts Were Growing Up
writer: Norman Panama, Melvin Frank, Frank Waldman
actors: Gail Russell, Diana Lynn, Brian Donlevy
plot: Cornelia and Emily, at college in the early 1920s, have triangle trouble with their beaus. Their affairs become entangled with those of a bootlegger whom they've met by chance. Much of the humor derives from pre-Roaring Twenties n...
